title: Tuna Salad Wrap
description: A simple and refreshing salad made with canned tuna, mixed with herbs and spices, served in a crispy Ukrainian-style wrap. Perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: 1. Drain the canned tuna and flake it into a large bowl.
2. Add the chopped cucumber, mayonnaise, chopped dill, salt, and pepper to the bowl with the tuna.
3. Mix well until all the ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Lay a Ukrainian-style wrap flat on a clean surface.
5. Spoon the tuna salad mixture onto the center of the wrap, leaving a small border around the edges.
6. Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
7. Slice the wrap in half and serve immediately.
